---
title: "GG_Sidedness_3var"
author: "D. Grespin"
date: "2026-01-14"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

## Load Libraries

```{r load-libraries}

library(R.matlab)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggbreak)
library(dplyr)
library(effectsize)

```

## Load and arrange Matlab data

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r load-variables}

# read MATLAB .mat file into R (make sure to copy full path or place in your working directory)
distVintStruct1 <- readMat('/Users/drew.grespin/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofDenver/cav1_project/dataMats/line_dataMats/lineOutDvI5_March5.mat')
distVintStruct2 <- readMat('/Users/drew.grespin/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofDenver/cav1_project/dataMats/line_dataMats/lineOutDvI10_March5.mat')
distVintStruct3 <- readMat('/Users/drew.grespin/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofDenver/cav1_project/dataMats/line_dataMats/lineOutDvI15_March5.mat')
distVintStruct4 <- readMat('/Users/drew.grespin/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofDenver/cav1_project/dataMats/line_dataMats/lineOutDvI20_March5.mat')
distVintStruct5 <- readMat('/Users/drew.grespin/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofDenver/cav1_project/dataMats/line_dataMats/lineOutDvI_Actin10_March5.mat')

# Load raw data
distVintRaw1 <- distVintStruct1$lineOutDvI5.March5            # pull proper variable from MATLAB structure
dfRaw1       <- data.frame(
                           Normalized_Distance  = distVintRaw1[[1]],
                           Normalized_Intensity = distVintRaw1[[2]]
                          )

distVintRaw2 <- distVintStruct2$lineOutDvI10.March5                   # pull proper variable from MATLAB structure
dfRaw2       <- data.frame(
                           Normalized_Distance  = distVintRaw2[[1]],
                           Normalized_Intensity = distVintRaw2[[2]]
                          )

distVintRaw3 <- distVintStruct3$lineOutDvI15.March5                   # pull proper variable from MATLAB structure
dfRaw3       <- data.frame(
                           Normalized_Distance  = distVintRaw3[[1]],
                           Normalized_Intensity = distVintRaw3[[2]]
                          )

distVintRaw4 <- distVintStruct4$lineOutDvI20.March5                   # pull proper variable from MATLAB structure
dfRaw4       <- data.frame(
                           Normalized_Distance  = distVintRaw4[[1]],
                           Normalized_Intensity = distVintRaw4[[2]]
                          )

distVintRaw5 <- distVintStruct5$lineOutDvI.Actin10.March5                   # pull proper variable from MATLAB structure
dfRaw5       <- data.frame(
                           Normalized_Distance  = distVintRaw5[[1]],
                           Normalized_Intensity = distVintRaw5[[2]]
                          )

```

## Isolate desired data segments for analysis

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r isolate-segments}

# Split df1 into high and low

dfRaw1_rear  <- dfRaw1[dfRaw1$Normalized_Distance <= -0.4, ]
dfRaw1_front <- dfRaw1[dfRaw1$Normalized_Distance >   0.6, ]

# Split df2 into high and low
dfRaw2_rear   <- dfRaw2[dfRaw2$Normalized_Distance <= -0.4, ]
dfRaw2_front  <- dfRaw2[dfRaw2$Normalized_Distance >   0.6, ]

# Split df3 into high and low
dfRaw3_rear   <- dfRaw3[dfRaw3$Normalized_Distance <= -0.4, ]
dfRaw3_front  <- dfRaw3[dfRaw3$Normalized_Distance >   0.6, ]

# Split df2 into high and low
dfRaw4_rear   <- dfRaw4[dfRaw4$Normalized_Distance <= -0.4, ]
dfRaw4_front  <- dfRaw4[dfRaw4$Normalized_Distance >   0.6, ]

# Split df3 into high and low
dfRaw5_rear   <- dfRaw5[dfRaw5$Normalized_Distance <= -0.4, ]
dfRaw5_front  <- dfRaw5[dfRaw5$Normalized_Distance >   0.6, ]

nrow(dfRaw1_rear)
nrow(dfRaw1_front)
nrow(dfRaw2_rear)
nrow(dfRaw2_front)
nrow(dfRaw3_rear)
nrow(dfRaw3_front)
nrow(dfRaw4_rear)
nrow(dfRaw4_front)
nrow(dfRaw5_rear)
nrow(dfRaw5_front)

```

## Set up data frame for plotting

```{r df-setup}

dfPlot <- data.frame(
                     Intensity = c(
                       dfRaw1_rear$Normalized_Intensity,
                       dfRaw1_front$Normalized_Intensity,
                       dfRaw2_rear$Normalized_Intensity,
                       dfRaw2_front$Normalized_Intensity,
                       dfRaw3_rear$Normalized_Intensity,
                       dfRaw3_front$Normalized_Intensity,
                       dfRaw4_rear$Normalized_Intensity,
                       dfRaw4_front$Normalized_Intensity,
                       dfRaw5_rear$Normalized_Intensity,
                       dfRaw5_front$Normalized_Intensity
                     ),
                     Protein = factor(c(
                       rep("5",  length(dfRaw1_rear$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("5",  length(dfRaw1_front$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("10", length(dfRaw2_rear$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("10", length(dfRaw2_front$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("15", length(dfRaw3_rear$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("15", length(dfRaw3_front$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("20", length(dfRaw4_rear$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("20", length(dfRaw4_front$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("10A",length(dfRaw5_rear$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("10A",length(dfRaw5_front$Normalized_Intensity))
                     ), levels = c("5", "10", "15", "20", "10A")),
                     
                     Region = factor(c(
                       rep("Rear",  length(dfRaw1_rear$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("Front", length(dfRaw1_front$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("Rear",  length(dfRaw2_rear$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("Front", length(dfRaw2_front$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("Rear",  length(dfRaw3_rear$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("Front", length(dfRaw3_front$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("Rear",  length(dfRaw4_rear$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("Front", length(dfRaw4_front$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("Rear",  length(dfRaw5_rear$Normalized_Intensity)),
                       rep("Front", length(dfRaw5_front$Normalized_Intensity))
                     ), levels = c("Rear", "Front"))
                    )

xpos_map <- c(
              "5 Rear"    = 1.0,
              "5 Front"   = 1.4,
              "10 Rear"   = 1.9,
              "10 Front"  = 2.3,
              "15 Rear"   = 2.8,
              "15 Front"  = 3.2,
              "20 Rear"   = 3.7,
              "20 Front"  = 4.1,
              "10A Rear"  = 4.6,
              "10A Front" = 5.0
             )

dfPlot$x_pos <- xpos_map[paste(dfPlot$Protein, dfPlot$Region)]

```

## Compute stats for custom box & whiskers (IQR)

```{r iqr-compute}

box_stats <- dfPlot %>%
  group_by(Region, x_pos) %>%
  summarise(
            lower   = quantile(Intensity, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
            median  = quantile(Intensity, 0.50, na.rm = TRUE),
            upper   = quantile(Intensity, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop"
           )

```

## Compute stats for confidence interval & Cohen's d

```{r stat-compute}

rear_int5 <- dfPlot %>%
                 filter(Protein == "5", Region == "Rear") %>%
                 pull(Intensity)

front_int5 <- dfPlot %>%
                 filter(Protein == "5", Region == "Front") %>%
                 pull(Intensity)

rear_int10 <- dfPlot %>%
                 filter(Protein == "10", Region == "Rear") %>%
                 pull(Intensity)

front_int10 <- dfPlot %>%
                 filter(Protein == "10", Region == "Front") %>%
                 pull(Intensity)

rear_int15 <- dfPlot %>%
                 filter(Protein == "15", Region == "Rear") %>%
                 pull(Intensity)

front_int15 <- dfPlot %>%
                 filter(Protein == "15", Region == "Front") %>%
                 pull(Intensity)

rear_int20 <- dfPlot %>%
                 filter(Protein == "20", Region == "Rear") %>%
                 pull(Intensity)

front_int20 <- dfPlot %>%
                 filter(Protein == "20", Region == "Front") %>%
                 pull(Intensity)

rear_int10A <- dfPlot %>%
                 filter(Protein == "10A", Region == "Rear") %>%
                 pull(Intensity)

front_int10A <- dfPlot %>%
                 filter(Protein == "10A", Region == "Front") %>%
                 pull(Intensity)

cohens_d(rear_int5,  front_int5)
cohens_d(rear_int10, front_int10)
cohens_d(rear_int15, front_int15)
cohens_d(rear_int20, front_int20)
cohens_d(rear_int10A,front_int10A)
cohens_d(rear_int5,  rear_int10)
cohens_d(rear_int5,  rear_int15)
cohens_d(rear_int5,  rear_int20)
cohens_d(rear_int10, rear_int15)
cohens_d(rear_int10, rear_int20)
cohens_d(rear_int15, rear_int20)

mean(rear_int5)
mean(front_int5)
mean(rear_int5) - mean(front_int5)

t.test(rear_int5, front_int5)$conf.int

mean(rear_int10)
mean(front_int10)
mean(rear_int10) - mean(front_int10)

t.test(rear_int10, front_int10)$conf.int

mean(rear_int15)
mean(front_int15)
mean(rear_int15) - mean(front_int15)

t.test(rear_int15, front_int15)$conf.int

mean(rear_int20)
mean(front_int20)
mean(rear_int20) - mean(front_int20)

t.test(rear_int20, front_int20)$conf.int

mean(rear_int10A)
mean(front_int10A)
mean(rear_int10A) - mean(front_int10A)

t.test(rear_int10A, front_int10A)$conf.int

t.test(rear_int5,  rear_int10)$conf.int
t.test(rear_int5,  rear_int15)$conf.int
t.test(rear_int5,  rear_int20)$conf.int
t.test(rear_int10, rear_int15)$conf.int
t.test(rear_int10, rear_int20)$conf.int
t.test(rear_int15, rear_int20)$conf.int
t.test(rear_int5,  rear_int10A)$conf.int
t.test(rear_int10, rear_int10A)$conf.int
t.test(rear_int15, rear_int10A)$conf.int
t.test(rear_int20, rear_int10A)$conf.int

```

## Sample (for large datasets) and compute statistical significance between groups

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r signif-test}

# Rear comparison 5 to 10 µm
pval_rear_5to10 <- t.test(
                         dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "5" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"],
                         dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "10" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"]
                        )$p.value

# Front comparison 5 to 10 µm
pval_front_5to10 <- t.test(
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "5" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"],
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "10" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"]
                         )$p.value

# Rear comparison 5 to 15 µm
pval_rear_5to15 <- t.test(
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "5" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"],
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "15" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"]
                         )$p.value

# Front comparison 5 to 15 µm
pval_front_5to15 <- t.test(
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "5" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"],
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "15" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"]
                          )$p.value

# Rear comparison 5 to 20 µm
pval_rear_5to20 <- t.test(
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "5" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"],
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "20" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"]
                         )$p.value
 
# Front comparison 5 to 20 µm
pval_front_5to20 <- t.test(
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "5" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"],
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "20" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"]
                          )$p.value

# Rear comparison 10 to 15 µm
pval_rear_10to15 <- t.test(
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "10" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"],
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "15" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"]
                         )$p.value

# Front comparison 10 to 15 µm
pval_front_10to15 <- t.test(
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "10" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"],
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "15" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"]
                          )$p.value

# Rear comparison 10 to 20 µm
pval_rear_10to20 <- t.test(
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "10" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"],
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "20" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"]
                         )$p.value
 
# Front comparison 10 to 20 µm
pval_front_10to20 <- t.test(
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "10" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"],
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "20" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"]
                          )$p.value

# Rear comparison 15 to 20 µm
pval_rear_15to20 <- t.test(
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "15" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"],
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "20" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"]
                         )$p.value
 
# Front comparison 15 to 20 µm
pval_front_15to20 <- t.test(
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "15" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"],
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "20" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"]
                          )$p.value

# Rear comparison 5 to 10 Actin µm
pval_rear_5to10A <- t.test(
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "5" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"],
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "10A" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"]
                         )$p.value

# Front comparison 5 to 10 Actin µm
pval_front_5to10A <- t.test(
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "5" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"],
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "10A" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"]
                         )$p.value

# Rear comparison 10 to 10 Actin µm
pval_rear_10to10A <- t.test(
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "10" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"],
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "10A" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"]
                          )$p.value

# Front comparison 10 to 10 Actin µm
pval_front_10to10A <- t.test(
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "10" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"],
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "10A" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"]
                          )$p.value

# Rear comparison 15 to 10 Actin µm
pval_rear_15to10A <- t.test(
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "15" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"],
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "10A" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"]
                         )$p.value

# Front comparison 15 to 10 Actin µm
pval_front_15to10A <- t.test(
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "15" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"],
                          dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "10A" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"]
                         )$p.value

# Rear comparison 20 to 10 Actin µm
pval_rear_20to10A <- t.test(
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "20" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"],
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "10A" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"]
                          )$p.value
 
# Front comparison 20 to 10 Actin µm
pval_front_20to10A <- t.test(
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "20" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"],
                           dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "10A" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"]
                          )$p.value

# 5 µm front to rear comparison
pval_5 <- t.test(
                 dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "5" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"],
                 dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "5" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"]
                )$p.value

# 10 µm front to rear comparison
pval_10 <- t.test(
                 dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "10" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"],
                 dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "10" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"]
                )$p.value

# 15 µm front to rear comparison
pval_15 <- t.test(
                  dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "15" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"],
                  dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "15" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"]
                 )$p.value

# 20 µm front to rear comparison
pval_20 <- t.test(
                 dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "20" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"],
                 dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "20" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"]
                )$p.value

# 10 Actin µm front to rear comparison
pval_10A <- t.test(
                  dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "10A" & dfPlot$Region == "Rear"],
                  dfPlot$Intensity[dfPlot$Protein == "10A" & dfPlot$Region == "Front"]
                 )$p.value

## =========================
## Significance bars (ALL TIERS)
## =========================

# Helper: p-value -> significance label
p_to_label <- function(p) {
  ifelse(p < 0.001, "***",
         ifelse(p < 0.01, "**",
                ifelse(p < 0.05, "*", "ns")))
}

# Positioning parameters
y_start      <- 1.25
y_step       <- 0.16
y_within_grp <- 1.06

# Offset helper for visual spacing at ends
offset <- 0.05

# Within-group comparisons (front vs rear) – stay at bottom
within_group <- data.frame(
  x_start = c(xpos_map["5 Rear"], xpos_map["10 Rear"], xpos_map["15 Rear"], xpos_map["20 Rear"], xpos_map["10A Rear"]),
  x_end   = c(xpos_map["5 Front"], xpos_map["10 Front"], xpos_map["15 Front"], xpos_map["20 Front"], xpos_map["10A Front"]),
  pval    = c(pval_5, pval_10, pval_15, pval_20, pval_10A),
  tier    = 0
)

# Rear–rear comparisons (tiered)
rear_rear <- data.frame(
  x_start = c(
    xpos_map["5 Rear"], xpos_map["10 Rear"], xpos_map["15 Rear"], xpos_map["20 Rear"], # pval_rear_5to10, pval_rear_10to15, pval_rear_15to20, pval_rear_20to10A
    xpos_map["5 Rear"], xpos_map["15 Rear"],  # pval_rear_5to15, pval_rear_15to10A
    xpos_map["10 Rear"],  # pval_rear_10to20
    xpos_map["5 Rear"],   # pval_rear_5to10A
    xpos_map["5 Rear"],   # pval_rear_5to20
    xpos_map["10 Rear"]   # pval_rear_10to10A
  ),
  x_end = c(
    xpos_map["10 Rear"], xpos_map["15 Rear"], xpos_map["20 Rear"], xpos_map["10A Rear"], # pval_rear_5to10, pval_rear_10to15, pval_rear_15to20, pval_rear_15to20, pval_rear_20to10A
    xpos_map["15 Rear"], xpos_map["10A Rear"], # pval_rear_5to15, pval_rear_15to10A
    xpos_map["20 Rear"],   # pval_rear_10to20
    xpos_map["10A Rear"],  # pval_rear_5to10A
    xpos_map["20 Rear"],   # pval_rear_5to20
    xpos_map["10A Rear"]   # pval_rear_10to10A
  ),
  pval = c(
    pval_rear_5to10, pval_rear_10to15, pval_rear_15to20, pval_rear_20to10A,
    pval_rear_5to15, pval_rear_15to10A,
    pval_rear_10to20,
    pval_rear_5to10A,
    pval_rear_5to20,
    pval_rear_10to10A
  ),
  tier = c(1, 1, 1, 1,
           2, 2,
           3,
           4,
           5,
           6)
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    x_start = ifelse(x_start < x_end, x_start + offset, x_start - offset),
    x_end   = ifelse(x_end > x_start, x_end - offset, x_end + offset)
  )

# Front–front comparisons (tiered)
front_front <- data.frame(
  x_start = c(
    xpos_map["5 Front"], xpos_map["10 Front"], xpos_map["15 Front"], xpos_map["20 Front"], # pval_front_5to10, pval_front_10to15, pval_front_15to20, pval_front_20to10A
    xpos_map["5 Front"], xpos_map["15 Front"],  # pval_front_5to15, pval_front_15to10A
    xpos_map["10 Front"],  # pval_front_10to20
    xpos_map["5 Front"],   # pval_front_5to10A
    xpos_map["5 Front"],   # pval_front_5to20
    xpos_map["10 Front"]   # pval_front_10to10A
  ),
  x_end = c(
    xpos_map["10 Front"], xpos_map["15 Front"], xpos_map["20 Front"], xpos_map["10A Front"], # pval_front_5to10, pval_front_10to15, pval_front_15to20, pval_front_20to10A
    xpos_map["15 Front"], xpos_map["10A Front"], # pval_front_5to15, pval_front_15to10A
    xpos_map["20 Front"],   # pval_front_10to20
    xpos_map["10A Front"],  # pval_front_5to10A
    xpos_map["20 Front"],   # pval_front_5to20
    xpos_map["10A Front"]   # pval_front_10to10A
  ),
  pval = c(
    pval_front_5to10, pval_front_10to15, pval_front_15to20, pval_front_20to10A,
    pval_front_5to15, pval_front_15to10A,
    pval_front_10to20,
    pval_front_5to10A,
    pval_front_5to20,
    pval_front_10to10A
  ),
  tier = c(7, 7, 7, 7,
           8, 8,
           9,
           10,
           11,
           12)
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    x_start = ifelse(x_start < x_end, x_start + offset, x_start - offset),
    x_end   = ifelse(x_end > x_start, x_end - offset, x_end + offset)
  )

# Combine all comparisons
sig_lines <- dplyr::bind_rows(within_group, rear_rear, front_front) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    y = y_within_grp + tier * y_step,
    label = p_to_label(pval)
  )

```

## Preset theme elements

```{r theme-setup}

# Define colors
region_colors <- c("Rear" = "red", "Front" = "green")

# Define line parameters
median_length   <- 0.3
quartile_length <- 0.2

median_size   <- 4
quartile_size <- 3

# Define theme
plot_theme <- theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title         = element_text(size = 20, face = 'bold', hjust = 0.5, family = 'Arial'),
    axis.title         = element_text(size = 16, face = 'bold', hjust = 0.5, family = 'Arial'),
    axis.text.y        = element_text(size = 36, hjust = 0.5, family = 'Arial', face = 'bold'),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(linewidth = 4, color = 'gray40'),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    legend.position    = "none"
  )

```

## Setup plot features

```{r plot-setup}

boxplot <- ggplot(dfPlot, aes(x = x_pos, y = Intensity)) +
           # Raw points
           geom_jitter(
                       width = 0.14,
                       alpha = 0.05,
                       size  = 0.5,
                       color = "black"
           ) +
           # Vertical IQR line
           geom_segment(
                        data = box_stats,
                        aes(x = x_pos, xend = x_pos, y = lower, yend = upper, color = Region),
                        size = quartile_size
                       ) +
           # Q1 and Q3 horizontal lines
           geom_segment(
                        data = box_stats,
                        aes(
                            x     = x_pos - quartile_length / 2,
                            xend  = x_pos + quartile_length / 2,
                            y     = lower,
                            yend  = lower,
                            color = Region
                           ),
                           size = quartile_size
                       ) +
           geom_segment(
                        data = box_stats,
                        aes(
                            x     = x_pos - quartile_length / 2,
                            xend  = x_pos + quartile_length / 2,
                            y     = upper,
                            yend  = upper,
                            color = Region
                           ),
                           size = quartile_size
                       ) +
           # Median line
           geom_segment(
                        data = box_stats,
                        aes(
                            x     = x_pos - median_length / 2,
                            xend  = x_pos + median_length / 2,
                            y     = median,
                            yend  = median,
                            color = Region
                           ),
                        size = median_size
                       ) +
           #X/Y scales
           scale_x_continuous(
                              breaks = c(1.0,1.4,1.9,2.3,2.8,3.2,3.7,4.1,4.6,5.0),
                              labels = c("", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", "", ""),
                              expand = c(0,0)
                             ) +
           scale_y_continuous(
                              limits = c(-.1, 3.6),
                              breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.25),
                              expand = c(0, 0)
                             ) +
           # Color of IQR lines
           scale_color_manual(
                              values = c(region_colors)  # combined for points and segments
                             ) +
           # Remove axis labels
           labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
           # add plot set up elements
           plot_theme

```

## Add significance to plot

```{r signif-plot}

boxplot <- boxplot +
           geom_segment(
                        data = sig_lines,
                        aes(x = x_start,
                            xend = x_end,
                            y = y,
                            yend = y),
                        color = "black",
                        linewidth = 2
                       ) +
           geom_text(
                       data = sig_lines,
                              aes(
                                  x = (x_start + x_end) / 2,
                                  y = y + ifelse(label == "ns", 0.10, 0.01),
                                  label = label,
                                 ),
                              size = ifelse(sig_lines$label == "ns", 15, 25)  # 10 for "ns", 5 for others
                    )

```

## Plot Output

```{r print-plot, fig.width = 22, fig.height = 11}

boxplot

```

```{r ratio-finder}

ratio_df <- dfPlot %>%
  group_by(Protein, Region) %>%
  summarise(mean_int = mean(Intensity, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = Region, values_from = mean_int) %>%
  mutate(ratio = Rear / Front)
  
## Rear/Front ratio plot

ratio_plot <- ggplot(ratio_df, aes(x = Protein, y = ratio)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.5, fill = "grey40") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 32) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = ""
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x  = element_blank(),   # removes "5 10 15 20 10A"
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank()    # removes tick marks
  )
  
```

```{r ratio-plot, fig.width=3.5, fig.height=2.5}
ratio_plot

```
